General.Name: Hmvod Ltd
General.Description: hmvod Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of over-the-top (OTT) services in Hong Kong. The company produces and distributes films, television programs, and music production on OTT platforms. It also provides multi-media related and content services through different platforms. hmvod Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Fook Hong Industrial Building, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
